inventory.finding: No exact duplicate file is safe to delete; duplication is in repeated CLI child execution and overlapping command surfaces.

families.scope: build_*.py plus analyze builders invoked by atlasctl
families.disposition: Retain implementations until direct imports, custom arguments and fixture parity are migrated.

deletion_blockers: CI calls the script directly
tests import and exercise its implementation
direct CLI exposes custom input and output arguments not present on atlasctl
sync_codex_memory_data.py invokes the builder directly
tests import its functions
origin/main contains newer provider-neutral behavior that must be reconciled before migration
stage tests import the builder directly
filter and apply parity has not been proven across all callers
atlasctl apply still delegates to this implementation
proposal contract tests import it directly

families.disposition: Retain source implementations until fixture parity and every direct caller are migrated.

deletion_blockers: atlasctl sync delegates to this implementation
source-specific tests import it directly
installer and scheduled updater call the script directly
tests import it directly
direct CLI exposes build and backup options not present on atlasctl
atlasctl sync delegates to this implementation
source-specific tests import it directly

families.disposition: Retain independent audit contracts; atlasctl final audit is an orchestrator, not an equivalent replacement.

deletion_blockers: CI, installer and deploy call it directly
atlasctl has no behavior-equivalent release subcheck
acceptance audit imports its API
atlasctl has no behavior-equivalent visual acceptance subcheck
goal-completion audit imports its API
CI, installer and deploy call it directly
CI and owner acceptance call it directly
live evidence semantics are not equivalent to atlasctl final audit
S05-P1-T1 human-plane, S05-P2-T1 truth-index and S05-P2-T2 controlled-cleanup acceptance depend on this audit
S05-P3-T2 integrates the broader readability rule through ui semantic_readability and the release Chinese UX gate
S04-P3-T2 current-value inventory and zero-caller gate depend on this audit
deletion would remove the fail-closed proof for historical validator removal
S07-P3-T3 acceptance requires the real empty-directory two-run restore and derived rebuild command
deletion would remove the portable machine-readable recovery proof entrypoint

families.disposition: Public validation uses four profiles; S04-P3-T2 deleted approved historical/source-marker aggregates and retained risk-bearing implementations.

deletion_blockers: fast profile invokes the validator as an internal implementation
fast profile invokes the validator as an internal implementation
ui profile and final audit invoke the browser gate as an internal implementation
ui profile and final audit execute the real three-viewport browser gate
it uniquely protects release identity, layout, focus, disclosure, accessibility, and responsive hierarchy
